title: Genuine
description: A modpack that aims to enhance the Vanilla experience without compromising the Vanilla style! Showcase: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=brLaH_vvIwA
body:
A modpack that aims to enhance the Vanilla experience without compromising the Vanilla style!

Showcase here:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=brLaH_vvIwA

Features:

- end remastered; you have to search all the cool places in the game to find many different eyes to get to the end!

- improved third person camera

- better visuals and functionality on crafting tables, anvils, and enchantment tables!

- more particles, visual enhancements, and better audio!

- Yung's better structures!

- many more small tweaks!

IMPORTANT: check the patch notes of the version you download for extra mods not available on modrinth to get the best experience!

SERVER SETUP VERSIONS:

Fabric 14.21

Forge 45.1.0
